ddls:
CREATE TABLE "account_types" (
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account type */,
  "account_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the account type (e.g., Fixed Assets, Current Assets) */,
  "account_type_code" TEXT /* Code for the account type (e.g., fixed_assets, current_assets) */,
  "close_method" TEXT /* Method used to close the account (e.g., Balance, None) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report associated with the account (e.g., asset, liability) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the account type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the account type is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_code" TEXT /* Code for the account */,
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account type */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency associated with the account */,
  "opening_balance" REAL /* Initial balance of the account */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was opened */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_account_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_type_id") REFERENCES account_types ("account_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., debit, credit) */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code for the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base currency */,
  "exchange_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate between the two currencies */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the exchange rate is effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., balance sheet, income statement) */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "report_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account type */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the account type in the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report detail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_account_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_type_id") REFERENCES account_types ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "client_code" TEXT /* Code for the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_accounts" (
  "client_account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client account */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account */,
  "account_manager" TEXT /* Account manager responsible for the client account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_accounts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_accounts_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., accountant, financial analyst, client) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, transaction) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_categories" (
  "account_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account category */,
  "account_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the account category */,
  "account_category_code" TEXT /* Code for the account category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the account category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_account_categories" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account */,
  "account_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id", "account_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "report_template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report template */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_template_details" (
  "report_template_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report template detail */,
  "report_template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report template */,
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report template detail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_template_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_template_details_report_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_template_id") REFERENCES report_templates ("report_template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_template_details_account_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_type_id") REFERENCES account_types ("account_type_id")
)
